meta.name: Dave's Notion Workspace
meta.description: Topology map of Notion workspace structure — hubs, databases, pages, and governance nodes.
meta.author: Dave Robertson

meta.desc: Primary workspace entry point. The single front door across all life areas.
risks: Top-level sprawl can make the entry experience feel overloaded
Too many downstream branches may weaken dashboard clarity
nextMoves: Reduce top-level options to the most-used hubs
Promote high-frequency destinations into a primary nav group

meta.desc: Top-level hub for all technology, AI, and software work.
Hub for professional work, career development, and business projects.
Hub for home improvement, family projects, and household management.
Main control panel for all software projects. Houses linked views of all key DBs: AI Projects, Dev Work, Bugs, Capture, Decisions, Naming, Context.
risks: Too many linked databases can dilute dashboard clarity
Governance pages may drift from execution databases
High dependency concentration makes this a fragile node
nextMoves: Audit all linked views for duplication
Separate daily execution views from governance views
Add dependency score badge to this node

meta.desc: Creative project hub. Connected to DB | Creative Projects.
Home life management hub. Household, family operations, personal projects.
Technology-specific navigation hub under Tech & AI.
Hub for workshop, garage, and garden projects.
Canonical product tracker. PromptLab, Garden OS, NotionWidgets. Authoritative "product" object — work items, bugs, and decisions all relate back here.
risks: May become overloaded if product and execution metadata mix together
Rollup accuracy depends on relation hygiene across multiple databases
nextMoves: Validate all product relation fields across Dev Work, Bugs, and Decisions
Define required properties for every product row

meta.desc: Execution layer. All dev work items across all software projects. Relations to AI Projects Tracker.
risks: Work items without a Product relation create orphan records
No rollup of effort hours makes capacity invisible
nextMoves: Enforce required Product relation on all new rows
Add effort estimate property for capacity tracking

meta.desc: Quality layer. All bugs and issues. Relates to AI Projects Tracker via Product relation.
Intake layer. AI conversation extracts that yield dev work or decision records.
Governance layer. Records all technical decisions (ADRs). Fed by Capture and Dev Work.
risks: Decisions recorded without context become uninterpretable over time
No review cadence means stale decisions persist as active
nextMoves: Create a quarterly ADR review workflow

meta.desc: Tracks naming decisions and terminology standards across workspace and codebase.
Library of reusable AI context templates for prompting Claude consistently across projects.
General subsystems DB (e.g. Embedded Notion Widgets). Separate from AI Projects Tracker which tracks products.
Tracks creative projects (non-software). Lives under HUB | Creative Projects.
Home and family projects DB used within HUB | Home Life.
Front door for PromptLab. Linked DB views filtered to Prompt Lab, key docs, architecture embed, and archive.
Front door for Garden OS (raised bed planner). Linked views, architecture docs, iteration notes.
Structured brief page for PromptLab project. At-a-glance, key docs, operational views, archive.
Structured brief page for Garden OS. At-a-glance, key docs, operational views.
Workspace Information Architecture Analysis. Reference for consolidation and structural decisions.
